theme_archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast with Street Marketing Energy

brand_identity.vibe: Bold, productized SaaS meets gritty, high-energy street marketing.
brand_identity.core_emotion: Action-oriented, rebellious but professional, transparent, energetic.
brand_identity.visual_cues: Pill-shaped tier badges, sticker/label motifs, massive typography, raw grids, ticker/marquee animations.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Maximalist, asymmetrical, bento grids. Deep padding for containers.
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-6 to p-12 inside containers to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid for Marketing sections. Offset alignment, negative space.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. 1px solid dark borders on bright surfaces to mimic printed stickers or receipts.

surface_styles.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with a 1px solid border-b border-[#0A0A0A]/10.
surface_styles.cards: Neubrutalist/Tactile: Flat white background, sharp 1px solid border (#0A0A0A), hard drop shadow (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]). No soft blurs.
surface_styles.badges: Pill-shaped, high-contrast. E.g., bg-[#5BB011] text-white or bg-[#FF4F33] text-white.
surface_styles.footer: Massive dark block (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with vibrant accent typography.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift sharply (-translate-y-1, -translate-x-1) and shadow increases to 8px_8px. Buttons invert colors.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Continuous ticker showing live activations or 'ADD TO CART • RETAIL ACTIVATION •'. bg-[#FF4F33] text-white, uppercase.
motion_and_interactions.slider_feedback: Haptic/Visual snap. As user drags the quantity slider, numbers tick up rapidly, and tier badge flashes when a new pricing bracket is reached.
motion_and_interactions.cart_add: Scale bounce on cart icon, slight screen flash or toast notification sliding in from bottom right with neubrutalist borders.

components_strategy.forms: Shadcn based. Use heavy, high-contrast inputs (border-2 focus:border-[#0A0A0A] focus:ring-0).
components_strategy.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Massive padding. 'Retail Price Tag' motif (maybe a punched hole graphic using CSS or simple stark contrast).
components_strategy.sliders: Custom or Shadcn slider heavily styled. Thick track, large square or pill thumb to match the 'bold' aesthetic.

homepage_hero.layout: 2-column or split asymmetric. Left: Massive 'BUILD YOUR SPRINT' typography, marquee ribbon. Right: Interactive Card.
homepage_hero.interactive_element: Quantity Slider. Range 1-100+. Real-time price calculation: Test Sprint (1-6) $200, Sprint 1 (12-29) $190, Sprint 2 (30-59) $180, Sprint 3 (60+) $165. Updates 'Total' and 'Tier Name' instantly.

sprints_page.layout: Grid of 4 SKU Cards (Test, Sprint 1, 2, 3) behaving like e-commerce product listings.
sprints_page.card_design: Sticker motif. Prominent quantity slider inside the card itself or globally above them that highlights the active SKU card based on quantity selected.
sprints_page.details: Include 'per-activation' crossed-out price logic to show volume discounts.

cart_drawer.content: Line items (Tier, Qty, Subtotal). Heavy bottom border for the 'Total' line. Checkout CTA.

cart_page.layout: Two-pane. Left: Complex Event Details Form (dates, locations, brand name, SKUs, staffing notes). Right: Order Summary.
cart_page.skip_feature: Prominent toggle/banner at the top: 'Skip the details — schedule an onboarding call instead'. Replaces the heavy form with a simple calendar/booking embed and basic contact info.

order_success.content: Receipt-style order lookup card, next steps timeline (1. Onboarding, 2. Staffing, 3. Activation).

header.right: 'Pricing' link, 'Book Call' secondary ghost button, Cart Icon with red/coral dot notification.

image_urls.description: Bustling outdoor market/street vendor scene. Use for 'Retail Activation' ambient background or hero imagery.
Three clean beverage cans. Use for product/SKU visual representations or SaaS tier placeholders.
Vibrant grocery store display. Use to ground the agency in physical retail spaces.
Lively street vendor scene with diverse people. Perfect for 'street marketing energy' sections.
Pouring amber liquid at a tasting event. Good for 'ambient/brand' sections showcasing beverage focus.
